info.english_meaning: to be thoroughly preparedto be accomplishedto be achieved to be ready
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: saMrAdDiH = vipattiH  ' siDeH siDyati saMrAdDO ' (Slo. 116) iti devaH  saMrAdDiH nizpattiH  ' kecidUditaM paWanti  tadasat  anudAttopadeSavEyarTyAt ' iti mADavaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'BUtaM BavyaM BavizyaM ca sarvaM vedAt prasiDyati' (manu॰12.97) prasiDyati praBavati prAdurBavati
'taTEkavfttitA tayoH svaraSca me prasiDyati' (pA॰3.1.122 ityatra Slo॰vA0) prasiDyati vyaktimeti vyAKyAto Bavati
'na prasiDyanti karmARi kriyatAmavicAraRAt' (hari0 25121) prasiDyanti siDyanti anarTakaH praSabdaH kriyatAM kurvatAm
'tAByAM yuktvA prAseDat na udajayat' (paYca0 brA0 14313) prAseDat prAgacCat prAtizWata
'etO me gAvO pramarasya yuktO mo zu pra seDIrmuhurinmamanDi' (f0 102720) mA praseDIH=mA sma apAjaH mA'pagamaya
'japyenEva tu saMsiDyed brAhmaRo nAtra saMSayaH' (manu0 287) saMsiDyet=apavargamApnuyAt paramAnandaM vindet
'saMsiDyasva mahAbAho kuru kAryamanantaram' (BA0 vana0 36834) kftI Bava kftArTaH syA ityAha
'AbAlameva saMsidDaM kartuM Saknoti ko'nyaTA' (yo0 vA0 6 (u0) 15631) saMsidDaM svaBAvajam sAMsidDikam
'…saMsidDaM priyarAGavam sumitrA gacCa gacCeti punaH punaruvAca tam' (rA0 2408) saMsidDaM gamanodyuktam iti govindarAjaH
'aTa yadasyAnnamupasidDaM syAt' (go0 gf0 194) upasidDaM samIpe sidDam
